untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cross-sectional ranking across 52 commodities by 12-month returns and selecting the top-ranked commodity. This requires: (1) portfolio-level ranking logic not expressible in single-instrument indicator conditions, (2) dynamic instrument selection (which future to trade), and (3) relative performance comparison across a basket. The allowed indicators operate on single price series and cannot express 'rank position X out of 52' or 'compare returns vs. all peers'. Standard momentum entry/exit conditions cannot capture the cross-sectional selection mechanism.
translation_notes: This is a statistical arbitrage/cross-sectional momentum strategy that requires basket-level analysis and dynamic instrument selection. It cannot be reduced to single-instrument technical conditions using the provided indicator set. Implementation requires a custom ranking function at the portfolio/multi-instrument level, not individual signal rules.
